name: CareRatings
description: CareRatings (formerly CARE Ratings) is an Indian credit rating agency offering credit ratings, analytics, consulting, research and ESG services. It is part of the CareEdge Group and is publicly listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange and National Stock Exchange of India.

## Reports

###  Latest Industry
& Economic
Research
### CareEdge Debt Quality Index (CDQI)
[VIEW REPORT](javascript:void\(0\))
Line graph showing the CAREEDGE Debt Quality Index from January to September 2025. The index starts at a moderate level in January, gradually increases through March, peaks around May, then slightly declines in June and July, and stabilizes at a high level from August to September, indicating improving debt quality over the period.
### CareEdge Credit Quality Assessment
[VIEW REPORT](javascript:void\(0\))
Line graph showing the CAREEDGE Debt Quality Index trend from FY12 to H1 FY26, remaining largely stable around the 1.0 level between FY12 and FY22, rising sharply from H1 FY22 to peak around H1 FY23, then declining significantly through H1 FY24, followed by moderate fluctuations with gradual recovery, ending at a higher level by H1 FY26 compared to the long-term average before FY22.

tavily.answer:
CareEdge's official website is www.careratings.com. It is India's second-largest credit rating agency. Established in 1993, it offers credit ratings and analytics.
CareRatings is an Indian credit rating agency offering financial services, headquartered in Mumbai. It was established in 1993 and is publicly listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange and National Stock Exchange of India. It provides credit ratings, analytics, and advisory services.
CARE Ratings Limited is a credit rating agency providing services in India and internationally. It was founded in 1993 and is part of the CareEdge Group. Crunchbase does not provide specific information on CARE Ratings Limited.
Wellfound is a legitimate job board for startups, with a 4.1/5 Trustpilot rating and a focus on tech and startup positions. It connects job seekers directly with hiring teams, but lacks broader job market features. It's best for those targeting startup roles.
DealRoom is a comprehensive M&A platform offering tools for deal sourcing, diligence, and management. It provides real-time data and insights for startups and tech ecosystems. DealRoom partners with global tech ecosystems to offer intelligence on emerging companies.
